questions.questionText: Why did the six residents have to find another place to stay?
questions.questionTextZh: 为什么六位居民不得不另找住处？

options.label: A
options.text: Due to a fire alarm in their apartments.

options.label: B
options.text: Because of the smoke and heat damage.

options.label: C
options.text: Due to the water used to extinguish the flames.

options.label: D
options.text: Because of the collapse of the three-story building.

questions.questionText: What does the news report say the Norwalk fire marshal is doing?
questions.questionTextZh: 新闻报道说Norwalk消防局长正在做什么？

options.label: A
options.text: Investigating the cause of the incident.

options.label: B
options.text: Helping search for the suspect of the crime.

options.label: C
options.text: Rescuing the businessmen trapped in the building.

options.label: D
options.text: Checking town records for the property developer.

questions.questionText: What have a number of past studies found about season of birth?
questions.questionTextZh: 许多过去的研究发现了关于出生季节的什么？

options.label: A
options.text: It plays a less important role in one's health than nutrient intake.

options.label: B
options.text: It impacts people's health to a lesser degree than sun exposure.

options.label: C
options.text: It is associated with people's mental health conditions.

options.label: D
options.text: It is linked with older adults' symptoms of depression.

questions.questionText: What did the new study find about the relationship between participants' month of birth and symptoms of depression?
questions.questionTextZh: 新研究发现了参与者的出生月份与抑郁症状之间有什么关系？

options.label: A
options.text: It was indefinite.

options.label: B
options.text: It was systematic.

options.label: C
options.text: It was straightforward.

options.label: D
options.text: It was insignificant.

questions.questionText: What did the researchers' tests show about the cloned dog?
questions.questionTextZh: 研究人员的测试显示克隆狗有什么特点？

options.label: A
options.text: It has helped solve several murder cases.

options.label: B
options.text: It has become a star police dog in Beijing.

options.label: C
options.text: It has surpassed its mother in performance.

options.label: D
options.text: It has done better than naturally born dogs.

questions.questionText: What is the scientists' purpose in cloning police dogs?
questions.questionTextZh: 科学家克隆警犬的目的是什么？

options.label: A
options.text: To speed up investigation into criminal cases.

options.label: B
options.text: To test the feasibility of cloning technology.

options.label: C
options.text: To cut down training expenses.

options.label: D
options.text: To reduce their training time.

questions.questionText: Why does the news report say the scientists' goal is not yet possible?
questions.questionTextZh: 为什么新闻报道说科学家的目标还不可能实现？

options.label: A
options.text: Cloning is too complicated a process.

options.label: B
options.text: The technology is yet to be accepted.

options.label: C
options.text: Cloning is ethically controversial.

options.label: D
options.text: The technology is too expensive.

questions.questionText: How did the man get to know about the book The Three-Body Problem?
questions.questionTextZh: 男士是如何了解到《三体》这本书的？

options.label: A
options.text: He read it somewhere online.

options.label: B
options.text: He heard about it from a coworker.

options.label: C
options.text: He read an article reviewing it.

options.label: D
options.text: He watched a TV series based on it.

questions.questionText: What does the woman say she can't remember about the book's author?
questions.questionTextZh: 女士说她记不住关于这本书作者的什么信息？

options.label: A
options.text: His publications.

options.label: B
options.text: His first book.

options.label: C
options.text: His address.

options.label: D
options.text: His name.

questions.questionText: What does the man have to do to finish his thesis?
questions.questionTextZh: 男士必须做什么来完成他的论文？

options.label: A
options.text: Collect a lot more data.

options.label: B
options.text: Relax a bit less often.

options.label: C
options.text: Clarify many new concepts.

options.label: D
options.text: Read more reference books.

questions.questionText: What will the man most probably do first after the conversation?
questions.questionTextZh: 对话结束后男士最可能先做什么？

options.label: A
options.text: Find out the show's most interesting episodes.

options.label: B
options.text: Watch the series together with the woman.

options.label: C
options.text: Get an e-copy of the book to read.

options.label: D
options.text: Check to see when the show starts.

questions.questionText: Why does the woman call the man?
questions.questionTextZh: 女士为什么给男士打电话？

options.label: A
options.text: To check the prices of his farm produce.

options.label: B
options.text: To ask the way to the Newcastle City Hall.

options.label: C
options.text: To inquire about the vegetarian food festival.

options.label: D
options.text: To seek the man's help with her work on the farm.

questions.questionText: What is the man still looking for?
questions.questionTextZh: 男士还在寻找什么？

options.label: A
options.text: Bakers.

options.label: B
options.text: Vendors.

options.label: C
options.text: Vegetarians.

options.label: D
options.text: Organisers.

questions.questionText: What does the man say they are getting close to?
questions.questionTextZh: 男士说他们正在接近什么？

options.label: A
options.text: The issuing of certificates to vendors.

options.label: B
options.text: The completion of the baking task.

options.label: C
options.text: The festival they are organising.

options.label: D
options.text: The deadline for application.

questions.questionText: What does the man finally ask the woman to remember?
questions.questionTextZh: 男士最后请女士记住什么？

options.label: A
options.text: The closing date of submission.

options.label: B
options.text: The website of his company.

options.label: C
options.text: The details of the ceremony.

options.label: D
options.text: The organiser's address.

questions.questionText: Why has wild camping become popular in the UK?
questions.questionTextZh: 为什么野外露营在英国变得流行？

options.label: A
options.text: Most scenic sites have been closed.

options.label: B
options.text: Access to official campsites is limited.

options.label: C
options.text: Health experts advise going outdoors.

options.label: D
options.text: People have more time during the summer.

questions.questionText: Why is camping banned for part of the summer in public parks?
questions.questionTextZh: 为什么夏季部分时间公园禁止露营？

options.label: A
options.text: It is strongly opposed by nearby residents.

options.label: B
options.text: It leads to much waste of public money.

options.label: C
options.text: It has caused environmental concerns.

options.label: D
options.text: It has created conflicts among campers.

questions.questionText: What does the speaker suggest campers do?
questions.questionTextZh: 演讲者建议露营者做什么？

options.label: A
options.text: Look for open land in Scotland.

options.label: B
options.text: Leave no trace of their camping.

options.label: C
options.text: Avoid getting close to wilderness.

options.label: D
options.text: Ask for permission from authorities.

questions.questionText: What does the passage say about pink dolphins?
questions.questionTextZh: 关于粉色海豚，文章说了什么？

options.label: A
options.text: They outcompete mythical creatures.

options.label: B
options.text: They usually mind their own business.

options.label: C
options.text: They truly exist in the Amazon region.

options.label: D
options.text: They resemble alarmingly large snakes.

questions.questionText: What is the unusual coloring of pink dolphins believed to originate in?
questions.questionTextZh: 粉色海豚不寻常的颜色被认为源于什么？

options.label: A
options.text: Scar tissue from dolphins' fighting.

options.label: B
options.text: Skin infection from water pollution.

options.label: C
options.text: Unhealed wounds from snake bites.

options.label: D
options.text: Swimming along in seasonal floods.

questions.questionText: What has become of the Amazon wetland system since 2018?
questions.questionTextZh: 自2018年以来亚马逊湿地系统发生了什么？

options.label: A
options.text: It has been shrinking at an astonishing pace.

options.label: B
options.text: It has been placed under international protection.

options.label: C
options.text: It has been appealing to both freshwater and sea dolphins.

options.label: D
options.text: It has been abandoned as a battleground for male dolphins.

questions.questionText: What do we learn from a new survey by Merrill Lynch Age Wave?
questions.questionTextZh: 从美林证券Age Wave的新调查中我们了解到什么？

options.label: A
options.text: About 58% of young adults call parental support the new normal.

options.label: B
options.text: Most adult children enjoy increasing sources of financial support.

options.label: C
options.text: A full 70% of the young adults cannot afford to buy a car by themselves.

options.label: D
options.text: Most early adults cannot sustain their lifestyles without parental support.

questions.questionText: Why did most young adults in the survey say financial support to children aged 25 to 34 is a bad thing?
questions.questionTextZh: 为什么调查中大多数年轻人说对25至34岁子女的经济支持是坏事？

options.label: A
options.text: It renders them dependent.

options.label: B
options.text: It causes them to lose dignity.

options.label: C
options.text: It makes them mentally immature.

options.label: D
options.text: It hinders them from getting ahead.

questions.questionText: What did the respondents in the survey say regarding financial independence?
questions.questionTextZh: 调查受访者关于经济独立说了什么？

options.label: A
options.text: It challenges one's willpower.

options.label: B
options.text: It results from education.

options.label: C
options.text: It calls for due assistance.

options.label: D
options.text: It defines adulthood.

questions.questionText: What is one big reason young adults are struggling?
questions.questionTextZh: 年轻人挣扎的一个主要原因是什么？

options.label: A
options.text: Current lifestyles.

options.label: B
options.text: Poor budgeting.

options.label: C
options.text: College loans.

options.label: D
options.text: Emergency expenses.
